meta.description: Base layer: Open StreetMap

ECOSTRESS instrument mounted on the International Space Station. Data shows land surface temperatures measured during early afternoon hours in °C. The map is composed of single observations acquired between June 1st to June 24th, in order to result in an almost cloud-free image.
Auto-generated description for Drought hazard context

Satellite-derived pollutant fields (e.g., NO₂/SO₂/CO columns depending on product) to build population exposure proxies and support health-impact screening and reporting context for air-pollution reduction.
Land cover map for 2021 with statistics by NUTS.  Click on the "Statistics" tab and then select a geographic area of interest.

A 10 meter resolution global land cover product for the year 2021, developed and validated in near-real time based on Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 data.  Data is provided with statistics for NUTS (Nomenclature of territorial units for statistics) boundaries.  Select the "statistics" tab and click on a feature to view.
Land cover map for 2021
Above ground biomass (AGB) in t/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
World Cereal spring cereals, globally, at 10m resolution in specific seasons throughout the year.
World Cereal winter cereals, globally, at 10m resolution in specific seasons throughout the year.

World Cereal temporary crops, globally, at 10m resolution in specific seasons throughout the year.  A piece of land that is sowed/planted and harvestable at least once within the 12 months after the sowing/planting date.
Global maps of maize for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Multi-year crop-rotation layer indicating temporal crop sequencing, useful for rotation and diversification assessments.
European soil-organic-carbon layer supporting soil health, carbon-stock context, and land-condition assessment.
Shows the change in tree cover between 2018 and 2021.
Vegetation index representing plant vigor and productivity derived from Sentinel-2.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of primary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of secondary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European level amapping of the presence of fallow land over cropland, at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha

sources.name: Sen4LDN Land cover over time - Portugal

meta.description: Trends in land cover between 2018 and 2023 are evaluated based on an automated algorithm to map land cover dynamics at 10 m resolution that combines deep learning and a pixel classifier on pre-processed Sentinel-2 imagery and ancillary input layers.

sources.name: Sen4LDN Trends in land productivity Values of Trend Coefficient - Portugal

meta.description: Values of trend coefficient of productivity over the period 2018-2023 (day / year) between -10 and +10.  (Scale needs to be offset by 1/10 - 10)
Using above-ground biomass (AGB) changes as a proxy for carbon stock changes to provide an estimate independent of trends (between 2010 and 2018) in land cover and trends in land productivity.

sources.name: Sen4LDN Trend in Land Cover - Degradation Probability Map between 2018 and 2023 - Portugal

meta.description: Carbon stock estimates (including soil/biomass proxies) providing the carbon-stocks component for SDG 15.3.1 (LDN triad).

sources.name: Sen4LDN Land cover degradation trends - Portugal

meta.description: Trends in land cover between 2018 and 2023 are evaluated based on an automated algorithm to map land cover dynamics at 10 m resolution that combines deep learning and a pixel classifier on pre-processed Sentinel-2 imagery and ancillary input layers.

Provides pan-European binary information on built-up areas at 10 m spatial resolution for the 2021 reference year. Built-up areas correspond to artificial above-ground constructions (e.g. buildings) within the sealing outline derived from the Imperviousness Density 2021 layer.

attribution.text: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) – HRL Non-Vegetated Land Cover Characteristics (Built-Up 2021), data service by GeoVille

layout.subinterfaceGroup: 11.1 / 11.3  Urban extent, housing and land consumption

meta.description: Global settlement-extent layer capturing the spatial footprint of human settlements and urban expansion, useful for settlement mapping, urban growth analysis, and SDG 11 reporting context.

attribution.text: © DLR (German Aerospace Center) – World Settlement Footprint Program

layout.subinterfaceGroup: 11.1 / 11.3  Urban extent, housing and land consumption

meta.description: High-resolution Land Surface Temperature (LST) derived via the CHILL-y downscaling framework, applied to Sentinel-3 SLSTR thermal data. This raster represents surface radiant temperature at ~10–30 m resolution for the overpass on 13 August 2024.

attribution.text: © ESA – CHILL-y LST Downscaling Consortium (Sentinel-3 SLSTR LST)
